docs.title: #incidents channel
docs.content:
Thread in #incidents:
frank: Update: the login failures tracked in AUTH-78 are now resolved. We deployed the fix 10 minutes ago and error rate is back to baseline.
eve: Confirmed. AUTH-78 is closed. Root cause was the OAuth callback URL having a trailing slash that the IdP rejected.
frank: PR #33 was the fix - stripped the trailing slash in the callback URL builder. No further action needed.

docs.title: AUTH-78: OAuth login failures - callback URL rejected by IdP
docs.content:
Issue AUTH-78: OAuth login failures - callback URL rejected by IdP
Status: Done
Assignee: frank
Description: Login attempts via OAuth are failing. IdP returns 'redirect_uri_mismatch'. The callback URL has a trailing slash that is not registered with the IdP.

expected_edges.note: Slack message explicitly announces AUTH-78 is resolved after deploying the fix
